<?php namespace Spatie\Ray\Payloads; use Spatie\Backtrace\Backtrace; use Spatie\Backtrace\Frame; use Throwable; class ExceptionPayload extends Payload { /** @var \Throwable */ protected $exception; /** @var array */ protected $meta = []; public function __construct(Throwable $exception, array $meta = []) { $this->exception = $exception; $this->meta = $meta; } public function getType(): string { return 'exception'; } public function getContent(): array { Backtrace::createForThrowable($this->exception); return [ 'class' => get_class($this->exception), 'message' => $this->exception->getMessage(), 'frames' => $this->getFrames(), 'meta' => $this->meta, ]; } protected function getFrames(): array { $frames = Backtrace::createForThrowable($this->exception)->frames(); return array_map(function (Frame $frame) { return [ 'file_name' => $this->replaceRemotePathWithLocalPath($frame->file), 'line_number' => $frame->lineNumber, 'class' => $frame->class, 'method' => $frame->method, 'vendor_frame' => ! $frame->applicationFrame, 'snippet' => $frame->getSnippetProperties(12), ]; }, $frames); } }
